_about: append-only project timeline. AI agents auto-extend this. do not reorder or delete entries.

milestones.title: initial ship
milestones.summary: browserscript that captures claude.ai conversations + diagrams via React fiber read
decisions: reads widget_code from __reactFiber -> memoizedProps -> updatedMessage.content to bypass iframe sandbox
injects DIAGRAM_CSS as <style> block inside SVG to resolve c-blue/c-teal/etc color classes
replaces stroke='context-stroke' with stroke='#6b7280' for standalone SVG rendering
resolves var(--t) by injecting svg { --t: #6b7280; } as first CSS rule
bookmarklet wraps script tag with jsdelivr CDN + cache-bust timestamp
known_issues: only captures diagrams present in React fiber- share pages with 'Connecting to visualize...' placeholder may miss some
fiber walk depth capped at 15- very deep component trees may miss widget data

milestones.title: canonical API + bulk export
milestones.summary: added claudecanonical (single-chat canonical API extractor) and claudeexportall (bulk account export with full tool results)
decisions: render_all_tools=true returns full raw tool_result JSON- confirmed on places_search conversation
auto-detects chat-capable org (capabilities includes 'chat') vs API org
org ID stored in .env (gitignored), .env.example ships clean
claudecanonical.sh extracts UUID from URL or clipboard, copies canonical URL to clipboard
claudeexportall.js exports all conversations + projects (with prompt_template) + knowledge docs + memory + styles
copy() fallback if blob download blocked by popup blocker
three tools ranked by completeness: (1) claudecanonical, (2) claudeexportall, (3) claudecapture
known_issues: session cookies expire- refresh claude.ai if 401s
rate limiting possible on bulk export- script auto-waits 5s on 429
internal API endpoints can change without notice

milestones.title: diagrams.js + cleanup
milestones.summary: added diagrams.js post-processor, removed bookmarklet.js, simplified README
decisions: canonical JSON already contains widget_code in tool_use blocks - identical SVG to claudecapture DOM scrape
diagrams.js wraps canonical widget_code as standalone HTML with baked-in DIAGRAM_CSS + context-stroke fix
verified byte-identical output: diagrams.js from canonical == claudecapture.js from DOM
removed bookmarklet.js (CDN indirection, no unique value)
claudecapture.js kept as future content script for browser extension direction
README cut from 196 to ~70 lines - removed fallback matrix, verbose problem/solution framing
known_issues: sendPrompt() onclick handlers in SVG diagrams are dead in standalone HTML (both tools)
DIAGRAM_CSS is hardcoded - if claude.ai changes their widget color classes, needs manual update
